---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for an improvement or new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is the current limitation or gap? Describe the flow that is difficult or painful right now.

## Proposed solution

How should lodestone work to solve this problem? Be as specific as possible about behavior, output, and user experience.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about and why you preferred your proposed solution.

## Use case

Who would benefit, and when would they use this? Examples: single-account users, cross-account workflows, measurement, integration with other tools, extension UI, etc.

## Related ADRs or research

If this relates to an existing design decision, link to the relevant ADR in `docs/decisions/`. If it depends on research about Claude Code internals, link to `docs/research/`.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, discussions, or community feedback.
